mission.title: linkerd: Destination routing to incorrect Pod IPs
mission.description: Destination routing to incorrect Pod IPs. Users encounter: "

steps.title: Identify linkerd troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description: Check for the issue in your linkerd deployment: ```bash kubectl get pods -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd -n linkerd --tail=100 | grep -i error ``` Look for error: `

steps.title: Review linkerd configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant linkerd configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd
kubectl get configmap -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=linkerd
```
### What is the issue?

We are seeing routing issues between LinkerD containers.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Destination routing to incorrect Pod IPs
steps.description:
When endpoints are removed from an EndpointSlice resource, the destination controller builds a list of addresses to remove.  However, if any of the removed endpoints have a Pod as their targetRef, we will attempt to fetch that pod to build the address to remove.  If that pod has already been
```yaml

ips: [10.12.0.101 10.12.14.49 10.12.27.134 10.12.5.7 10.12.37.11 10.12.39.183 10.12.8.59 10.12.18.209 10.12.3.11 10.12.43.4 10.12.51.222 10.12.10.15 10.12.2.148 10.12.28.67 10.12.32.94]
```

steps.title: Confirm Destination routing to incorrect Pod IPs is resolved
steps.description: Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs: ```bash kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd -n linkerd --tail=50 --since=5m kubectl get events -n linkerd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10 ``` Confirm that `

resolution.summary: When endpoints are removed from an EndpointSlice resource, the destination controller builds a list of addresses to remove.  However, if any of the removed endpoints have a Pod as their targetRef, we will attempt to fetch that pod to build the address to remove.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with linkerd installed or the issue environment reproducible.
